Name: NPC_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines the stats for a given enemy or group of enemies. Does not determine model or location.
Stats are often affected greatly by attached SpEffects.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Energy Automatic Recovery Control ID
Fields.Description: The ENAutoRecoveryControlParam parameter to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Corpse Ragdoll Force Influence %
Fields.Description: The influence rate to apply to the corpse ragdoll for this character.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: The name to display for this entity. Only appears on the health bar of c0000 characters.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used to determine the action parameters to use for this enemy.

Fields.Name: Simple Collision Height
Fields.Description: Vertical radius of hitbox used for character to character collision. Requires useRagdoll = false

Fields.Name: Simple Collision Radius
Fields.Description: Horizontal radius of hitbox used for character to character collision. Requires useRagdoll = false

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: The weight of the character.

Fields.Name: Collision Height Offset
Fields.Description: The vertical offset of the character's hitbox. Will cause them to float.

Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: The character's maximum hit points.

Fields.Name: MP
Fields.Description: The character's maximum mana points.

Fields.Name: Score on Defeat
Fields.Description: The amount of misson score that this character gives at the time of death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 1
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 2
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 3
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 4
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 5
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 6
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Humanity Lot ID
Fields.Description: The humanity item lot to use for humanity rewards upon this character's death.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 5
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 6
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 7
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: Game Clear
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character that only applies on NG+ and higher. Used to scale enemy stats for each NG+ journey.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Kinetic damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Energy
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Energy damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Explosive
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Explosive damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Coral
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Coral damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Primary Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: A value to offset animation IDs by. 0 = a00, 10000 = a01, etc.

Fields.Name: Move Animation ID
Fields.Description: The movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Special Movement Animation ID: 0
Fields.Description: The special movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Special Movement Animation ID: 1
Fields.Description: The special movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Network Warp Judgement Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which to warp this character instead of allowing standard movement during network synchronization.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: R1
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: L1
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: R2
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: L2
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Square
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Circle
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Cross
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Triangle
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Left Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Right Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Down Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Up Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Secondary Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: A value to offset animation IDs by. 0 = a00, 10000 = a01, etc.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 1
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 2
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 3
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 4
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 5
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 6
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 7
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 8
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Weak Point
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the weak point part.

Fields.Name: Poise Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The change to apply to poise recovery speed for this character.

Fields.Name: Poise Break Stagger Distance
Fields.Description: The knockback distance for the stagger when this character's poise is broken.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: The maximum stamina for this character.. Used for non c0000 enemies blocking in DS1

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The recovery speed for stamina for this character.

Fields.Name: Defense: Kinetic
Fields.Description: The flat Kinetic damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Slash
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat Kinetic defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Strike
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat Kinetic defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Thrust
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat Kinetic defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Energy
Fields.Description: The flat Energy damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Explosive
Fields.Description: The flat Explosive damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Coral
Fields.Description: The flat Coral damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Defense
Fields.Description: Innate deflection defense. Deflected attacks can have their damage reduced via flickDamageCutRate

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Burn
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Stun
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Plasma
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID to use for the wandering ghost version of this character.

Fields.Name: Normal Change: Resource ID
Fields.Description: The resource ID to use for the normal texture.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense generation range angle when guarding (horizontal direction). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: The amount of poise this character has. Requires dmgLevel to be set to function properly.

Fields.Name: Normal Change: Texture ID
Fields.Description: The resource ID to use for the character texture.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Type
Fields.Description: Determines behavior and appearance of dropped items.

Fields.Name: Disable on Floor Detection
Fields.Description: If ON, this character is subject to invalidation due to floor detection.

Fields.Name: Knockback ID
Fields.Description: The parameters to use for knockback.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: The dampening rate to apply to fall damage suffered.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Stamina
Fields.Description: The amount to reduce stamina damage by when received by the character.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: MP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The speed at which mana points are restored for this character.

Fields.Name: Default LOD Param ID
Fields.Description: The default LOD parameter to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Draw Type
Fields.Description: The draw type used for this character. Normally affects the shader used.

Fields.Name: Character Type
Fields.Description: The character type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: The team type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Move Type
Fields.Description: The move type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Additional Lock-on Distance
Fields.Description: Additional maximum lock-on distance added onto base distance defined in LockCamParam

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Parts Damage Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if weak parts (such as the head) will be affected by all attacks or just arrow attacks.
Headshot animation will be used for weak part attacks if it exists.

Fields.Name: Forward Undulation Limit
Fields.Description: The upper limit angle when adjusting the front and rear angles to match the undulations. If the overall length is long, it is better to set it lower. (If there is a FootIK, the FootIK value will be used.). Requires isUnduration

Fields.Name: Guard Damage Level
Fields.Description: When guarding, the guard animation offset to use when being attacked.

Fields.Name: Burn Particle Type
Fields.Description: The particle type to use when burning.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Burn
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Stun
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Plasma
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Curse
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Parry Attack
Fields.Description: The attack power value to use when calculating a parry as the parrying side.

Fields.Name: Parry Defense
Fields.Description: The defense power value to use when calculating a parry as the parried side.

Fields.Name: Particle Size
Fields.Description: The size of the particles used by this character.

Fields.Name: Camera Push-out Radius
Fields.Description: The collision radius for the character in which a camera is pushed away.

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Type
Fields.Description: Determines how enemy is affected by hitstop.

Fields.Name: Top of Ladder Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply when determining the top of a ladder (if this character is climbing). In 1/10 metres.

Fields.Name: Bottom of Ladder Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply when determining the top of a ladder (if this character is climbing). In 1/10 metres.

Fields.Name: Is Ragdoll Collision valid for Camera Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, then the character's ragdoll can collide with a camera.

Fields.Name: Disable Rigid Cloth Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, rigid cloth collision is ignored for this character.

Fields.Name: Use Ragdoll Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, then ragdoll is used for character to character collision. If false, hitRadius and hitHeight are used instead

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type A
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakA_DamageRate.

Fields.Name: Is Ghost
Fields.Description: If ON, character is treated as a ghost.

Fields.Name: Ignore Damage Motion for Dummy Hits
Fields.Description: If ON, damage level motion is ignored if the damage suffered is 0.

Fields.Name: Is Undulating
Fields.Description: If ON, enemies will rotate vertically on slopes. Rotation angle determines by maxUndurationAng

Fields.Name: Is Valid for Wandering Ghost
Fields.Description: If ON, character is valid for the wandering ghost feature.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 0
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 1
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 2
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 14
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 15
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Enable Head Oscillation
Fields.Description: If ON, then the character's head will oscillate.

Fields.Name: Disable Bonfire Respawn
Fields.Description: If ON, the character will not reset position and behavior when the player rests at a bonfire.

Fields.Name: Is Move Animation Persistent
Fields.Description: If ON, movement animation will continue during other animations.

Fields.Name: Is Crowd Character
Fields.Description: If ON, this character is considered a crowd character and will use a reduced profile when multiple characters are present.

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type B
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakB_DamageRate.

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type C
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakC_DamageRate.

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type D
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakD_DamageRate.

Fields.Name: Always Use Special Turn
Fields.Description: Always execute a special turn (even if there is no navigation mesh at the turn destination, the special turn is continuously executed)

Fields.Name: Vow Type
Fields.Description: The pledge type used by this character.

Fields.Name: Reload Character on Initialisation
Fields.Description: If true, dead enemies will be alive again when the game is reset without respawning enemies (such as quitting to menu)

Fields.Name: Apply Hit Rumble
Fields.Description: If ON, character vibrates when hit. Use when you want to change from a normal hit stop, such as a dead person.

Fields.Name: Use Smooth Turning
Fields.Description: If ON, perform interpolation when turning between nodes in route movement

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type E
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakE_DamageRate.

Fields.Name: Is Weak Type F
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with weakF_DamageRate.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Item Pickup Radius
Fields.Description: The radius to be added as a correction to the cylinder radius of normal Item search judgment (applicable to enemy drop items. Used for large characters etc.)

Fields.Name: Character Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Character Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Type
Fields.Description: The special turning type to apply for this character.

Fields.Name: Is Bullet Owner: By Object
Fields.Description: If ON, this character becomes the owner of a bullet; a flag that applies the object's damage calculation related to the bullet. Used for damage correction by power.

Fields.Name: Use FootIK Filter for Low Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, use the FootIk filter for low collision.

Fields.Name: Use Player vs. Player Damage
Fields.Description: If ON, calculate damage as a player when calculating damage.

Fields.Name: Check Ceiling with Integrated Raycast
Fields.Description: A flag that determines the ceiling height before making a lift judgment, taking into account that the ceiling is low, rather than a fixed lift of 30 cm when integrating (judging lifted floor). Note that this increases the processing load.

Fields.Name: Disable Integrated Raycast
Fields.Description: Disable lifting/suction. If you disable it, climbing up 1.5m steps will not work, but capsule movement should be almost problem-free. If it is enabled, it seems that the suction process may cause you to go out of the map.

Fields.Name: Is Huge Enemy
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered a huge enemy.

Fields.Name: Is Legacy Boss
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered a legacy boss.

Fields.Name: Defense: Dark
Fields.Description: The flat Dark damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Threat Level
Fields.Description: Threat level. If it is 0, even if the Player is found, FE that seems to be found is not displayed.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Distance Threshold
Fields.Description: Make a special turn when the distance to the target is greater than or equal to the set threshold

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX identifier used in the automatic foot effect. (ZZZ of XYYZZZ)

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (1: on Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (1: on Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (2: on Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (2: on Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when damaged.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 8
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 9
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 10
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 11
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 12
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 13
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 14
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 15
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: Foot Decal ID
Fields.Description: The decal ID to apply for footstep SFX. Floor material is taken into consideration alongside this ID.

Fields.Name: Toughness
Fields.Description: The base toughness value this character has.

Fields.Name: Toughness Correction
Fields.Description: The correction to apply to the base toughness recovery rate for this character.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Kinetic.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Slash.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Strike.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Thrust.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Energy
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Energy.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Explosive
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Explosive.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Coral
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Coral.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Dark
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Dark.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Dark
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to incoming damage if the damage type is Dark and this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Cloth Update Distance Offset
Fields.Description: The distance offset to use for the cloth update check for this character. In metres.

Fields.Name: NPC-AC Weight Type
Fields.Description: The equipment load type to apply to player-like characters.

Fields.Name: Model Replacement ID
Fields.Description: The character ID To use when replacing the model (ChrBND) and textures (TexBND) used by this character.

Fields.Name: Animation Replacement ID
Fields.Description: The character ID To use when replacing the animations (AniBND) used by this character.

Fields.Name: Paint Render Target Size
Fields.Description: The paint render target size for this character. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Damage Material Change Threshold
Fields.Description: The damage threshold at which the damage material changes. 0 is 0% damage, 100 is 100% damage.

Fields.Name: Side Undulation Limit
Fields.Description: The maximum angle when adjusting the left-right angles during undulations. If the total length is long, it is better to set this lower. (If there is a FootIK, the FootIK value will be used.)

Fields.Name: Particle Resource Bank ID
Fields.Description: The particle resource bank to use for this character. -1 means the bank with the same character ID as this character is used.

Fields.Name: Overlay Shader ID
Fields.Description: The overlay shader to apply to this character.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Correction ID
Fields.Description: The multiplayer correction parameters to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Depleted Uranium
Fields.Description: The flat defense value of this character for the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Depleted Uranium
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Team Type: Giant Nut Seed Change
Fields.Description: The team type this character follows after a Giant Nut Seed change has been applied.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Camera Parameters
Fields.Description: The lock-on camera parameters to use for players that target this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 16
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 17
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 18
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 27

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 28

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 29
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 30
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 31
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: Disallowed Lock-On Cone
Fields.Description: Create a conical area beneath this character based on the specificed angle. Prevents player lock-on. Can be changed temporarily from TAE.

Fields.Name: LOD Level to Disable Cloth Processing
Fields.Description: The LOD level at which to turn off Havok Cloth processing.

Fields.Name: Movement Control Type
Fields.Description: The movement control type to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Flask Recovery ID
Fields.Description: When this character dies, this flask recovery is applied to the player.

Fields.Name: Role Name ID
Fields.Description: Specify the role name at the time of summoning. -1 Use the default role name of the target spirit body. 0 No display. 1 or more Used as a text ID.

Fields.Name: HP/FP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: HP / MP est recovery probability when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: HP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: Recovery probability of MP Est when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: FP Flask Recovery Chance
